PowerUpStep1.title: Powering up
PowerUpStep1.description:
Hopefully by now your [color=KHAKI]Power Generator[/color] and your [color=KHAKI]Life Support[/color] should have been completed.

If not, you can click on the prefabs within your ship to see what materials are required and if they are available, otherwise designate more [color=KHAKI]Ship Debris[/color] to be deconstructed.

You can press [color=PURPLE]Continue[/color] once satisfied.

PowerUpStep2.title: Powering up
PowerUpStep2.description:
If completed your [color=KHAKI]Power Generator[/color] and [color=KHAKI]Life Support[/color] should be operational.

If they have not powered on, check your connections and ensure they have enough [color=KHAKI]Fuel[/color].

You can press [color=PURPLE]Continue[/color] once satisfied.
